# Mode Switch Template

- status: draft
- audience: execution routing / human-machine collaboration

## Instruction

Examples:

- `{do} finish today's plan`
- `{plan} refine this idea into an implementation plan`
- `{deep} open a sidecar deep research line for this topic`

## Target Mode

- default / plan / deep / do

## Scope

- current task
- current session
- current project

## `{do}` Fast Start Block

When mode is `{do}`, declare:

- accepted target
- current highest-priority line
- parked side lines
- known blockers
- next safe step
